refined_label: Clothing, Shoes & Jewelry — mixed family apparel & footwear
description: This neuron activates broadly across the entire Clothing, Shoes & Jewelry department, spanning women's, men's, girls', and baby apparel, footwear (boots, sneakers, clogs), jewelry (earrings, necklaces), and accessories (umbrellas, backpacks, watches). No single subcategory dominates.
